all.en: This report summarizes the findings of a comprehensive market research study on consumer preferences within the coffee shop industry.
all.zh: 本報告總結了一項針對咖啡店產業消費者偏好所進行之全面市場研究的結果。

all.en: The study was commissioned by the National Beverage Industry Association to identify emerging purchasing patterns and inform strategic decision-making.
all.zh: 本研究由全國飲料產業協會委託進行，旨在辨識新興的購買模式並為策略決策提供資訊。

all.en: Researchers employed a mixed-methodology approach combining online questionnaires, in-person interviews, and point-of-sale transaction analysis.
all.zh: 研究人員採用混合方法論，結合線上問卷、面對面訪談以及銷售點交易分析。

all.en: A total of 4,200 respondents from twelve metropolitan areas participated in the survey, which was conducted between September 2025 and February 2026.
all.zh: 共有來自十二個都會區的 4,200 名受訪者參與了於 2025 年 9 月至 2026 年 2 月期間進行的調查。

all.en: The sample was carefully stratified to ensure proportional representation across age, income, and geographic demographic segments.
all.zh: 樣本經過審慎分層，以確保在年齡、收入及地理人口統計區隔上具有比例代表性。

all.en: Key findings reveal that 68 percent of respondents visit a coffee shop at least three times per week, representing a 7 percent year-over-year increase.
all.zh: 主要發現顯示，68% 的受訪者每週至少光顧咖啡店三次，較去年同期增長 7%。

all.en: Furthermore, 54 percent of consumers indicated that the quality of the beverage was the single most important factor influencing their selection of an establishment.
all.zh: 此外，54% 的消費者表示，飲品品質是影響其選擇店家最重要的單一因素。

all.en: Ambience and seating availability ranked second and third respectively, with statistically significant variation observed across age groups.
all.zh: 氛圍和座位供應分別排名第二與第三，且在不同年齡層之間觀察到具有統計顯著性的差異。

all.en: Consumers aged 18 to 29 demonstrated a strong preference for specialty cold brews and plant-based milk alternatives, with 72 percent reporting weekly consumption.
all.zh: 18 至 29 歲的消費者對特調冷萃咖啡及植物奶替代品展現出強烈偏好，72% 表示每週皆會飲用。

all.en: In contrast, respondents over the age of 50 favored traditional drip coffee and were less inclined to experiment with seasonal menu items.
all.zh: 相對地，50 歲以上的受訪者偏好傳統手沖咖啡，且較不傾向嘗試季節性菜單品項。

all.en: Brand loyalty remains a defining characteristic of consumer behavior in this sector, with 61 percent of respondents identifying a primary preferred chain.
all.zh: 品牌忠誠度仍是本產業消費者行為的決定性特徵，61% 的受訪者明確指出一個主要偏好的連鎖品牌。

all.en: Mobile loyalty applications and reward programs were cited by 47 percent of participants as a decisive factor in repeat patronage.
all.zh: 47% 的參與者引述行動忠誠度應用程式與獎勵計畫為他們重複光顧的決定性因素。

all.en: Brand awareness among the top five national chains exceeded 90 percent, while regional and independent operators averaged only 34 percent recognition.
all.zh: 前五大全國連鎖品牌的品牌認知度超過 90%，而地區性與獨立經營者的平均認知度僅有 34%。

all.en: Pricing sensitivity varied considerably by income segment, with lower-income respondents reporting that a price increase of more than 50 cents would prompt them to switch vendors.
all.zh: 價格敏感度因收入區隔而有顯著差異，較低收入的受訪者表示，超過 50 美分的漲價即會促使他們更換供應商。

all.en: Conversely, higher-income consumers indicated a willingness to pay premium prices for ethically sourced beans and artisanal preparation methods.
all.zh: 相反地，較高收入的消費者表示願意為符合道德採購的咖啡豆及精緻手工沖煮方式支付溢價。

all.en: The market share of independent specialty cafés has grown by 4.2 percent over the past twelve months, primarily at the expense of mid-tier national chains.
all.zh: 獨立精品咖啡館的市場佔有率在過去十二個月成長了 4.2%，主要是搶占了中階全國連鎖品牌的市場。

all.en: Sustainability concerns also emerged as a notable trend, with 58 percent of respondents stating that environmental practices influence their purchasing decisions.
all.zh: 永續性議題也成為值得關注的趨勢，58% 的受訪者表示環境作為會影響他們的購買決策。

all.en: Based on these findings, the report offers several recommendations for industry players seeking to strengthen their competitive position.
all.zh: 基於上述發現，本報告為尋求強化競爭地位的業界參與者提出數項建議。

all.en: First, operators should invest in robust digital loyalty platforms to capitalize on the documented impact of reward programs.
all.zh: 首先，經營者應投資於健全的數位忠誠度平台，以善用獎勵計畫已被證實的影響力。

all.en: Second, menu diversification targeting the 18-to-29 demographic should prioritize cold beverages, plant-based options, and limited-edition seasonal offerings.
all.zh: 第二，針對 18 至 29 歲族群的菜單多元化應優先考量冷飲、植物性選項以及限定的季節性產品。

all.en: Third, transparent communication of sustainability initiatives may yield measurable returns in both brand perception and customer retention.
all.zh: 第三，透明地溝通永續性倡議可能在品牌認知與顧客留存兩方面帶來可衡量的回報。

all.en: Finally, smaller independent operators are advised to leverage social media and community engagement to offset their relative disadvantage in brand awareness.
all.zh: 最後，建議規模較小的獨立經營者善用社群媒體與社區互動，以彌補其在品牌認知度上的相對劣勢。

all.en: In conclusion, the coffee shop industry continues to expand at a healthy pace, but success will increasingly depend on data-driven adaptation to evolving consumer expectations.
all.zh: 總結而言，咖啡店產業持續以健康的步調擴展，但未來的成功將日益取決於依據數據驅動方式來適應不斷演變的消費者期望。

all.en: A complete dataset and supplementary analytical tables are available upon request from the research division.
all.zh: 完整的資料集與補充分析表格可向研究部門索取。

all.en: Further studies are planned to examine cross-border consumer behavior in markets across Southeast Asia and Latin America.
all.zh: 後續研究計劃探討橫跨東南亞與拉丁美洲市場的跨境消費者行為。

all.en: An executive summary version of this report has been prepared specifically for board-level distribution within member companies.
all.zh: 本報告之高階摘要版本已特別為會員公司董事會層級的傳閱而備妥。

all.en: Industry partners are invited to attend a webinar presenting the full findings on April 23 at 2 p.m. Eastern.
all.zh: 誠邀產業夥伴於東部時間 4 月 23 日下午 2 點參加完整研究結果發表的線上研討會。

all.en: Registration for the webinar is complimentary for association members and 95 dollars for non-member attendees.
all.zh: 協會會員可免費報名此線上研討會，非會員參加者則須繳交 95 美元費用。

all.en: Researchers have also identified a growing demand for grab-and-go formats among professionals working in business districts.
all.zh: 研究人員亦發現商務區的工作專業人士對外帶速取式型態的需求日益增長。

all.en: Drive-through service ranked highest in convenience scores, particularly among parents and commuters with limited time.
all.zh: 得來速服務在便利性評分中位居最高，尤其受家長與時間有限的通勤族青睞。

all.en: Notably, customer satisfaction scores correlated strongly with consistent staff training and friendly service interactions.
all.zh: 值得注意的是，顧客滿意度評分與一貫的員工訓練及親切的服務互動有顯著相關性。

all.en: The full report includes regional breakdowns and longitudinal comparisons spanning the past five years of survey data.
all.zh: 完整報告包含區域別細部分析以及涵蓋過去五年調查資料的縱貫性比較。

all.en: We thank all participating consumers, businesses, and research partners who contributed to the successful completion of this project.
all.zh: 我們感謝所有參與的消費者、企業與研究夥伴，為本專案的成功完成所做的貢獻。

all.en: Inquiries about licensing the dataset for commercial use should be directed to research@nbiassociation.org.
all.zh: 如欲洽詢將本資料集授權作商業用途相關事宜，請寄信至 research@nbiassociation.org。

all.en: Mobile ordering accounted for 38 percent of all transactions, with the highest adoption observed during weekday morning commutes.
all.zh: 行動點餐占所有交易的 38%，而平日早晨通勤時段觀察到最高的採用率。

all.en: Subscription-based coffee programs are emerging as a promising business model, particularly among consumers under the age of 35.
all.zh: 訂閱制咖啡方案正逐漸成為深具前景的商業模式，尤其受到 35 歲以下消費者的歡迎。

all.en: Customer wait time tolerance was found to average only four minutes during peak periods before satisfaction scores began to decline.
all.zh: 研究發現尖峰時段顧客的等候時間容忍度平均僅四分鐘，超過此時間滿意度即開始下滑。

all.en: Cafés offering reliable Wi-Fi and adequate power outlets reported significantly longer average customer dwell times than competitors.
all.zh: 提供穩定 Wi-Fi 及充足電源插座的咖啡店，平均顧客停留時間明顯較競爭對手為長。

all.en: Local sourcing of pastries and food items has become an increasingly important purchase consideration for environmentally aware consumers.
all.zh: 糕點及食品的在地採購已成為具環保意識消費者越來越重要的購買考量因素。

all.en: Promotional campaigns leveraging influencer partnerships generated measurable foot traffic increases of up to 22 percent during launch periods.
all.zh: 運用網紅合作的宣傳活動在上市期間帶來高達 22% 的可衡量人流增長。

all.en: Survey respondents also expressed strong interest in transparent ingredient labeling and detailed nutritional information on store menus.
all.zh: 受訪者亦對門市菜單上透明的成分標示及詳細營養資訊表達了強烈興趣。

all.en: Employee retention rates were found to correlate directly with customer satisfaction, underscoring the importance of fair compensation policies.
all.zh: 員工留任率與顧客滿意度直接相關，凸顯了公平薪酬政策的重要性。

all.en: Cross-promotional partnerships with local bakeries and bookstores were rated highly favorable by 64 percent of survey participants.
all.zh: 與在地烘焙坊及書店的交叉推廣合作，獲得 64% 的調查參與者高度好評。

all.en: The association will release a follow-up brief on operational best practices in approximately six months for member companies.
all.zh: 協會將於約六個月後為會員公司發布有關營運最佳實務的後續簡報。

all.en: Personally, I switched to a small neighborhood roastery last year just because the barista remembers my order without me asking.
all.zh: 我自己去年改去一家社區小烘豆店，純粹是因為咖啡師不用我開口就記得我的飲品。

all.en: A friend who runs a corner cafe told me her best decision was offering a one-dollar refill for anyone working on a laptop after 2 P.M.
all.zh: 一位開街角咖啡店的朋友告訴我，她最棒的決定就是下午 2 點後給筆電族一美元續杯。

all.en: If you walk into a cafe at 8 A.M. and there is no line, that is usually a quiet red flag worth paying attention to.
all.zh: 如果您早上 8 點走進咖啡店卻沒看到排隊人潮，這通常是值得注意的小警訊。

all.en: I keep noticing more people ordering ahead and just grabbing the cup off the shelf without ever speaking to a barista anymore.
all.zh: 我發現越來越多人直接線上點餐，然後從架上拿了杯子就走，全程不和咖啡師說話。

all.en: My favorite cafe near the office gives a small house-baked cookie to anyone bringing their own cup, and I see new converts every week.
all.zh: 辦公室附近我最愛的咖啡店會送自帶杯的客人一塊自製小餅乾，我每週都看到新的環保族加入。

all.en: Honestly, the chain stores are convenient, but the conversations I have at independent cafes feel like part of the actual product.
all.zh: 老實說，連鎖店確實方便，但獨立咖啡店裡的對話本身就像是商品的一部分。

all.en: One owner I interviewed said her most loyal customers came in not for the coffee but for the playlist she curates herself every week.
all.zh: 我訪問過的一位老闆說，她最忠誠的客人來不是為了咖啡，而是為了她每週親手挑選的歌單。

all.en: Subscription boxes for home brewing took off in my neighborhood after one cafe started including a handwritten tasting note in each delivery.
all.zh: 我家附近的居家手沖訂閱盒在一家咖啡店開始在每次配送中附上手寫品飲筆記後突然爆紅。

all.en: Older customers in my parents' generation still strongly prefer a real ceramic mug, and a cafe that ignores that loses easy regulars.
all.zh: 我父母那輩的年長顧客仍非常偏好用真正的陶瓷杯，忽略這一點的咖啡店會輕易流失常客。

all.en: When I asked my niece why she pays five dollars for an oat milk latte, she just shrugged and said it tastes like her morning playlist.
all.zh: 當我問姪女為什麼願意花五美元買一杯燕麥拿鐵時，她只是聳聳肩說那是她早晨歌單的味道。
